The '''04-Z power generator''' was a model of [[Power generator/Legends|power generator]] manufactured by [[Novaldex/Legends|Novaldex]]. It was installed in the popular [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="EGVV" />

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=The Farlander Papers|book=Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)}} {{1stm}} {{ID|O4-Z cryogenic power cell and ionisation reactor}}
*{{StoryCite|story=The Stele Chronicles|book=Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)}} {{Mo}}
*''[[X-Wing: Wraith Squadron]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Wraith Squadron (unabridged audiobook)}}
